name: The Treasure Vault
description:
This is a low, overengineered chamber directly beneath the trophy case. The treasures are arranged with bureaucratic precision, less like a hoard and more like an inventory that has finally reconciled. A stone dais at the far end bears a sealed gold coffin, its surface etched with the same procedural hieroglyphics seen elsewhere.

As the last item settles into place above, something ancient and mechanical acknowledges the state change. There is no fanfare. No judgment. Somewhere deep in the structure, a process completes and does not restart.

The Eternal Administrator does not rise. The coffin remains sealed. Whatever duty bound this system together has been satisfied, and it no longer requires your participation.
